grant_title: John and Maria Laffin Trust Grants 2026
eligible_applicant_type: nonprofit organizations recognized as tax-exempt under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code
geographic_restrictions: Education and animal welfare applicants must operate within Los Angeles City or County; medical research and human services projects are open globally.
project_area: education, animal welfare, medical research, and human services
demographic_requirements: None explicitly stated; applicants must align with one of the Trust’s four focus areas and demonstrate strong organizational capacity.
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations recognized as tax-exempt under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code, aligned with the Trust’s focus areas (education, animal welfare, medical research, or human services). Education and animal welfare applicants must operate within Los Angeles City or County; medical research and human services projects are open globally.
